```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

# ProductQA — RAG-Based Q&A Feature Plan

## Problem

The existing `ProductQA` .NET 10 Web API needs a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline so users can ask natural-language questions and get answers grounded in the product documentation markdown files (`Docs/`).

## Technology Selection (per decision tree)

| Concern | Technology | Package |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| LLM abstraction | Microsoft.Extensions.AI | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` 9.x |
| Embedding generation | MEAI `IEmbeddingGenerator<,>` | (same — included in MEAI) |
| LLM provider | Azure OpenAI **or** OpenAI | `Azure.AI.OpenAI` 2.x **or** `OpenAI` 2.x |
| Document ingestion & chunking | DataIngestion preview | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion` 9.x-preview |
| Vector store abstraction | MEVD | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` 9.x |
| Vector store provider | Choose one: Qdrant, pgvector, Azure AI Search, in-memory (dev) | Provider-specific package |
| Token counting | ML.Tokenizers | `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` 2.x |

**Not needed:** Microsoft Agent Framework (no tool calling / agentic loops). Copilot SDK (not a Copilot extension). ML.NET (no tabular ML).

## Architecture

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ASP.NET Core Web API                    │
│                                                                │
│  POST /api/documents/ingest          POST /api/qa/ask          │
│        │                                    │                  │
│        ▼                                    ▼                  │
│  ┌─────────────┐                    ┌──────────────┐           │
│  │ Ingestion   │                    │ Query        │           │
│  │ Service     │                    │ Service      │           │

│  │ 1. Read .md │                    │ 1. Embed     │           │
│  │ 2. Chunk    │                    │    question  │           │
│  │ 3. Embed    │                    │ 2. Vector    │           │
│  │ 4. Upsert   │                    │    search    │           │
│  └──────┬──────┘                    │ 3. Build     │           │
│         │                           │    prompt    │           │
│         ▼                           │ 4. LLM call  │           │
│  ┌─────────────────┐                │ 5. Return    │           │
│  │ IEmbedding-     │                │    answer +  │           │
│  │ Generator       │◄───────────────│    sources   │           │
│  └────────┬────────┘                └──────┬───────┘           │
│           │                                │                   │

## Guardrails

| Guardrail | How applied |
|-----------|------------|
| Relevance threshold | `MinimumScore = 0.75f` on vector search |
| Source attribution | Every answer includes the chunks that contributed |
| Embedding caching | Chunks are embedded once at ingestion; never re-embedded per query |
| Temperature 0 | Deterministic answers for factual Q&A |

## Project Structure (new files)

```
ProductQA/
├── Controllers/
│   ├── DocumentsController.cs   # POST /api/documents/ingest
│   └── QaController.cs          # POST /api/qa/ask
├── Models/
│   ├── DocumentChunk.cs          # Vector store record
│   ├── AskRequest.cs             # Inbound DTO
│   └── AskResponse.cs            # Outbound DTO with sources
├── Services/
│   ├── IngestionService.cs       # Chunking + embedding + upsert
│   └── QueryService.cs           # Retrieve + prompt + answer
├── Configuration/
│   └── AiOptions.cs              # IOptions<AiOptions> for keys, model, thresholds
├── Docs/                         # Existing markdown files
├── Program.cs                    # DI registration (updated)
└── ProductQA.csproj              # New package references (updated)
```

## DI Registration (Program.cs changes)

1. `services.Configure<AiOptions>(config.GetSection("AI"))` — model ID, thresholds, docs path.

3. `services.AddEmbeddingGenerator(...)` — `IEmbeddingGenerator` for `text-embedding-3-small`.
4. Register the vector store provider (in-memory for dev, Qdrant/pgvector for prod).
5. `services.AddScoped<IngestionService>()` and `services.AddScoped<QueryService>()`.

## Packages to Add

```xml
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion" Version="9.*-*" />
<PackageReference Include="OpenAI" Version="2.*" />           <!-- or Azure.AI.OpenAI -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers" Version="2.*" />
<!-- Vector store provider, e.g.: -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Qdrant" Version="9.*-*" />
```

## TODOs

1. Add NuGet package references to `ProductQA.csproj`
2. Create `AiOptions` configuration class
3. Create `DocumentChunk` vector store record model
4. Create request/response DTOs (`AskRequest`, `AskResponse`)
5. Implement `IngestionService` (read markdown → chunk → embed → upsert)
6. Implement `QueryService` (embed question → search → build prompt → call LLM → format response)
7. Create `DocumentsController` with ingest endpoint
8. Create `QaController` with ask endpoint
9. Update `Program.cs` with DI registrations
10. Add `appsettings.json` AI configuration section (no secrets)
11. Validate with `dotnet build -c Release -warnaserror`

# ProductQA — RAG-Based Q&A Feature Plan

## Problem

The existing `ProductQA` .NET 10 Web API needs a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline so users can ask natural-language questions and get answers grounded in the product documentation markdown files (`Docs/`).

## Technology Selection (per decision tree)

| Concern | Technology | Package |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| LLM abstraction | Microsoft.Extensions.AI | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` 9.x |
| Embedding generation | MEAI `IEmbeddingGenerator<,>` | (same — included in MEAI) |
| LLM provider | Azure OpenAI **or** OpenAI | `Azure.AI.OpenAI` 2.x **or** `OpenAI` 2.x |
| Document ingestion & chunking | DataIngestion preview | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion` 9.x-preview |
| Vector store abstraction | MEVD | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` 9.x |
| Vector store provider | Choose one: Qdrant, pgvector, Azure AI Search, in-memory (dev) | Provider-specific package |
| Token counting | ML.Tokenizers | `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` 2.x |

**Not needed:** Microsoft Agent Framework (no tool calling / agentic loops). Copilot SDK (not a Copilot extension). ML.NET (no tabular ML).

## Architecture

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ASP.NET Core Web API                    │
│                                                                │
│  POST /api/documents/ingest          POST /api/qa/ask          │
│        │                                    │                  │
│        ▼                                    ▼                  │
│  ┌─────────────┐                    ┌──────────────┐           │
│  │ Ingestion   │                    │ Query        │           │
│  │ Service     │                    │ Service      │           │
│  │             │                    │              │           │
│  │ 1. Read .md │                    │ 1. Embed     │           │
│  │ 2. Chunk    │                    │    question  │           │
│  │ 3. Embed    │                    │ 2. Vector    │           │
│  │ 4. Upsert   │                    │    search    │           │
│  └──────┬──────┘                    │ 3. Build     │           │
│         │                           │    prompt    │           │
│         ▼                           │ 4. LLM call  │           │
│  ┌─────────────────┐                │ 5. Return    │           │
│  │ IEmbedding-     │                │    answer +  │           │
│  │ Generator       │◄───────────────│    sources   │           │
│  └────────┬────────┘                └──────┬───────┘           │
│           │                                │                   │
│           ▼                                ▼                   │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐               │
│  │        Vector Store (MEVD abstraction)      │               │
│  │  Dev: InMemory  │  Prod: Qdrant / pgvector  │               │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘               │
│                                                                │
│  ┌─────────────────┐                                           │
│  │  IChatClient     │  (answer generation)                     │
│  │  (MEAI)          │                                          │
│  └─────────────────┘                                           │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Endpoints

### `POST /api/documents/ingest`

- Reads all `.md` files from the configured docs directory.
- Parses markdown, splits into chunks (semantic chunking on heading/paragraph boundaries via `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion`).
- Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`.
- Upserts chunk records (text, embedding, metadata: filename, heading) into the vector store.
- Returns: count of documents processed and chunks created.

### `POST /api/qa/ask`

Request body: `{ "question": "How do I configure the API key?" }`

Pipeline:
1. Embed the question using `IEmbeddingGenerator`.
2. Perform vector similarity search (top-K, min score threshold 0.75).
3. Assemble a grounded prompt: system instructions + retrieved chunks + user question.
4. Call `IChatClient.GetResponseAsync` (temperature 0, pinned model version).
5. Return the answer with source attribution (file name + section heading for each chunk used).

Response: `{ "answer": "...", "sources": [ { "file": "configuration.md", "section": "Configuration" } ] }`

## Data Model (Vector Store Record)

```
DocumentChunk
├── Id           : string  (GUID)
├── Text         : string  (chunk content)
├── Embedding    : ReadOnlyMemory<float>
├── FileName     : string  (source file)
├── SectionTitle : string  (nearest heading)
├── ChunkIndex   : int     (position within document)
```

## Guardrails

| Guardrail | How applied |
|-----------|------------|
| Relevance threshold | `MinimumScore = 0.75f` on vector search |
| Source attribution | Every answer includes the chunks that contributed |
| Embedding caching | Chunks are embedded once at ingestion; never re-embedded per query |
| Temperature 0 | Deterministic answers for factual Q&A |
| MaxOutputTokens | Set explicitly (e.g., 1024) to cap cost |
| Model version pinning | Use dated model ID (e.g., `gpt-4o-2024-08-06`) |
| Retry logic | `RetryingChatClient` wrapping the chat client |
| Secret management | API keys from user-secrets (dev) / env vars / Key Vault (prod) |
| Token budget | Use `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` to count prompt tokens before sending |
| Batch embeddings | Batch embed all chunks in ingestion, not one-by-one |
| Non-determinism fallback | If LLM returns empty/malformed output, return "unable to answer" with the raw chunks |

## Project Structure (new files)

```
ProductQA/
├── Controllers/
│   ├── DocumentsController.cs   # POST /api/documents/ingest
│   └── QaController.cs          # POST /api/qa/ask
├── Models/
│   ├── DocumentChunk.cs          # Vector store record
│   ├── AskRequest.cs             # Inbound DTO
│   └── AskResponse.cs            # Outbound DTO with sources
├── Services/
│   ├── IngestionService.cs       # Chunking + embedding + upsert
│   └── QueryService.cs           # Retrieve + prompt + answer
├── Configuration/
│   └── AiOptions.cs              # IOptions<AiOptions> for keys, model, thresholds
├── Docs/                         # Existing markdown files
├── Program.cs                    # DI registration (updated)
└── ProductQA.csproj              # New package references (updated)
```

## DI Registration (Program.cs changes)

1. `services.Configure<AiOptions>(config.GetSection("AI"))` — model ID, thresholds, docs path.
2. `services.AddChatClient(...)` — `IChatClient` via OpenAI/Azure provider with `RetryingChatClient`.
3. `services.AddEmbeddingGenerator(...)` — `IEmbeddingGenerator` for `text-embedding-3-small`.
4. Register the vector store provider (in-memory for dev, Qdrant/pgvector for prod).
5. `services.AddScoped<IngestionService>()` and `services.AddScoped<QueryService>()`.

## Packages to Add

```xml
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion" Version="9.*-*" />
<PackageReference Include="OpenAI" Version="2.*" />           <!-- or Azure.AI.OpenAI -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers" Version="2.*" />
<!-- Vector store provider, e.g.: -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Qdrant" Version="9.*-*" />
```

## TODOs

1. Add NuGet package references to `ProductQA.csproj`
2. Create `AiOptions` configuration class
3. Create `DocumentChunk` vector store record model
4. Create request/response DTOs (`AskRequest`, `AskResponse`)
5. Implement `IngestionService` (read markdown → chunk → embed → upsert)
6. Implement `QueryService` (embed question → search → build prompt → call LLM → format response)
7. Create `DocumentsController` with ingest endpoint
8. Create `QaController` with ask endpoint
9. Update `Program.cs` with DI registrations
10. Add `appsettings.json` AI configuration section (no secrets)
11. Validate with `dotnet build -c Release -warnaserror`

|---------|-----------|---------|

| Vector store abstraction | MEVD | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` 9.x |

| Token counting | ML.Tokenizers | `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` 2.x |

**Not needed:** Microsoft Agent Framework (no tool calling / agentic loops). Copilot SDK (not a Copilot extension). ML.NET (no tabular ML).

## Architecture

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ASP.NET Core Web API                    │
│                                                                │
│  POST /api/documents/ingest          POST /api/qa/ask          │
│        │                                    │                  │
│        ▼                                    ▼                  │
│  ┌─────────────┐                    ┌──────────────┐           │
│  │ Ingestion   │                    │ Query        │           │
│  │ Service     │                    │ Service      │           │
│  │             │                    │              │           │
│  │ 1. Read .md │                    │ 1. Embed     │           │
│  │ 2. Chunk    │                    │    question  │           │
│  │ 3. Embed    │                    │ 2. Vector    │           │
│  │ 4. Upsert   │                    │    search    │           │
│  └──────┬──────┘                    │ 3. Build     │           │
│         │                           │    prompt    │           │
│         ▼                           │ 4. LLM call  │           │
│  ┌─────────────────┐                │ 5. Return    │           │
│  │ IEmbedding-     │                │    answer +  │           │
│  │ Generator       │◄───────────────│    sources   │           │
│  └────────┬────────┘                └──────┬───────┘           │
│           │                                │                   │
│           ▼                                ▼                   │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐               │
│  │        Vector Store (MEVD abstraction)      │               │
│  │  Dev: InMemory  │  Prod: Qdrant / pgvector  │               │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘               │
│                                                                │
│  ┌─────────────────┐                                           │
│  │  IChatClient     │  (answer generation)                     │
│  │  (MEAI)          │                                          │
│  └─────────────────┘                                           │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Endpoints

### `POST /api/documents/ingest`

- Reads all `.md` files from the configured docs directory.
- Parses markdown, splits into chunks (semantic chunking on heading/paragraph boundaries via `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion`).
- Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`.
- Upserts chunk records (text, embedding, metadata: filename, heading) into the vector store.
- Returns: count of documents processed and chunks created.

### `POST /api/qa/ask`

Request body: `{ "question": "How do I configure the API key?" }`

Pipeline:
1. Embed the question using `IEmbeddingGenerator`.
2. Perform vector similarity search (top-K, min score threshold 0.75).
3. Assemble a grounded prompt: system instructions + retrieved chunks + user question.
4. Call `IChatClient.GetResponseAsync` (temperature 0, pinned model version).
5. Return the answer with source attribution (file name + section heading for each chunk used).

Response: `{ "answer": "...", "sources": [ { "file": "configuration.md", "section": "Configuration" } ] }`

## Data Model (Vector Store Record)

```
DocumentChunk
├── Id           : string  (GUID)
├── Text         : string  (chunk content)
├── Embedding    : ReadOnlyMemory<float>
├── FileName     : string  (source file)
├── SectionTitle : string  (nearest heading)
├── ChunkIndex   : int     (position within document)
```

## Guardrails

| Guardrail | How applied |
|-----------|------------|
| Relevance threshold | `MinimumScore = 0.75f` on vector search |
| Source attribution | Every answer includes the chunks that contributed |
| Embedding caching | Chunks are embedded once at ingestion; never re-embedded per query |
| Temperature 0 | Deterministic answers for factual Q&A |
| MaxOutputTokens | Set explicitly (e.g., 1024) to cap cost |
| Model version pinning | Use dated model ID (e.g., `gpt-4o-2024-08-06`) |
| Retry logic | `RetryingChatClient` wrapping the chat client |
| Secret management | API keys from user-secrets (dev) / env vars / Key Vault (prod) |
| Token budget | Use `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` to count prompt tokens before sending |
| Batch embeddings | Batch embed all chunks in ingestion, not one-by-one |
| Non-determinism fallback | If LLM returns empty/malformed output, return "unable to answer" with the raw chunks |

## Project Structure (new files)

```
ProductQA/
├── Controllers/
│   ├── DocumentsController.cs   # POST /api/documents/ingest
│   └── QaController.cs          # POST /api/qa/ask
├── Models/

├── Services/
│   ├── IngestionService.cs       # Chunking + embedding + upsert
│   └── QueryService.cs           # Retrieve + prompt + answer
├── Configuration/
│   └── AiOptions.cs              # IOptions<AiOptions> for keys, model, thresholds
├── Docs/                         # Existing markdown files

└── ProductQA.csproj              # New package references (updated)
```

+# ProductQA — RAG-Based Q&A Feature Plan
+
+## Problem
+
+The existing `ProductQA` .NET 10 Web API needs a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline so users can ask natural-language questions and get answers grounded in the product documentation markdown files (`Docs/`).
+
+## Technology Selection
+
+| Concern | Technology | Package |
+|---------|-----------|---------|
+| LLM abstraction | Microsoft.Extensions.AI | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` 9.x |
+| Embedding generation | MEAI `IEmbeddingGenerator<,>` | (included in MEAI) |
+| LLM provider | Azure OpenAI **or** OpenAI | `Azure.AI.OpenAI` 2.x or `OpenAI` 2.x |
+| Document ingestion & chunking | DataIngestion preview | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion` 9.x-preview |
+| Vector store abstraction | MEVD | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` 9.x |
+| Vector store provider | Qdrant, pgvector, Azure AI Search, or in-memory (dev) | Provider-specific package |
+| Token counting | ML.Tokenizers | `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` 2.x |
+
+**Not needed:** Microsoft Agent Framework (no tool calling / agentic loops), Copilot SDK, ML.NET.
+
+## Architecture
+
+```
+┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│                        ASP.NET Core Web API                    │
+│                                                                │
+│  POST /api/documents/ingest          POST /api/qa/ask          │
+│        │                                    │                  │
+│        ▼                                    ▼                  │
+│  ┌─────────────┐                    ┌──────────────┐           │
+│  │ Ingestion   │                    │ Query        │           │
+│  │ Service     │                    │ Service      │           │
+│  │             │                    │              │           │
+│  │ 1. Read .md │                    │ 1. Embed     │           │
+│  │ 2. Chunk    │                    │    question  │           │
+│  │ 3. Embed    │                    │ 2. Vector    │           │
+│  │ 4. Upsert   │                    │    search    │           │
+│  └──────┬──────┘                    │ 3. Build     │           │
+│         │                           │    prompt    │           │
+│         ▼                           │ 4. LLM call  │           │
+│  ┌─────────────────┐                │ 5. Return    │           │
+│  │ IEmbedding-     │                │    answer +  │           │
+│  │ Generator       │◄───────────────│    sources   │           │
+│  └────────┬────────┘                └──────┬───────┘           │
+│           │                                │                   │
+│           ▼                                ▼                   │
+│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐               │
+│  │        Vector Store (MEVD abstraction)      │               │
+│  │  Dev: InMemory  │  Prod: Qdrant / pgvector  │               │
+│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘               │
+│                                                                │
+│  ┌─────────────────┐                                           │
+│  │  IChatClient     │  (answer generation)                     │
+│  │  (MEAI)          │                                          │
+│  └─────────────────┘                                           │
+└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+```
 
+## Endpoints
+
+### `POST /api/documents/ingest`
+- Reads all `.md` files from the configured docs directory.
+- Semantic chunking on heading/paragraph boundaries via DataIngestion.
+- Batch-embeds chunks, upserts into vector store with metadata (filename, heading).
+- Returns: count of documents processed and chunks created.
+
+### `POST /api/qa/ask`
+Request: `{ "question": "How do I configure the API key?" }`
+
+1. Embed the question → vector similarity search (top-K, min score 0.75).
+2. Assemble grounded prompt: system instructions + retrieved chunks + user question.
+3. `IChatClient.GetResponseAsync` (temperature 0, pinned model version).
+4. Return answer with source attribution (file + section per chunk used).
+
+Response: `{ "answer": "...", "sources": [{ "file": "configuration.md", "section": "Configuration" }] }`
+
+## Data Model
+
+```
+DocumentChunk
+├── Id           : string  (GUID)
+├── Text         : string  (chunk content)
+├── Embedding    : ReadOnlyMemory<float>
+├── FileName     : string  (source file)
+├── SectionTitle : string  (nearest heading)
+├── ChunkIndex   : int     (position within document)
+```
+
+## Guardrails
+
+| Guardrail | How applied |
+|-----------|------------|
+| Relevance threshold | `MinimumScore = 0.75f` on vector search |
+| Source attribution | Every answer includes contributing chunk sources |
+| Embedding caching | Embed once at ingestion, never re-embed per query |
+| Temperature 0 | Deterministic factual Q&A |
+| MaxOutputTokens | Explicit cap (e.g., 1024) |
+| Model version pinning | Dated model ID (e.g., `gpt-4o-2024-08-06`) |
+| Retry logic | `RetryingChatClient` wrapping the chat client |
+| Secret management | user-secrets (dev) / env vars / Key Vault (prod) |
+| Token budget | `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers` for client-side counting |
+| Batch embeddings | Batch all chunks at ingestion |
+| Fallback | If LLM returns empty/malformed, return "unable to answer" + raw chunks |
